title: schoenus griffinianus
intro: Schoenus griffinianus, also known as Griffin's sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Schoenus griffinianus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and its ability to support immune system function. Traditionally, it is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
